title: Overloaded column named "ROWID" mishandled in triggers.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_r(a INT, ROWID INT);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_r_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_r FOR EACH ROW BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_r(a, ROWID) VALUES (NEW.a + 1, NEW.ROWID + 1);
SELECT ROWID, a, ROWID FROM fuzz_sqlite_r;
